title: OldCombatMod
description: Restore the 1.7 Sword Combat Animations in later Minecraft versions. This mod provides purely visual changes and applies only when a shield is equipped in your offhand.
body:
# OldCombatMod
The OldCombatMod brings back the 1.7 and earlier Combat Style. The "Sword blocking" is only possible when you have a shield equipped in your offhand. The cooldown for the sword remains unchanged; it is **not** removed. Same goes for the shield which still absorbs full damage and loses durability.

## Server Warning
While the mod only introduces visual changes and doesn't offer any gameplay advantages, it's worth noting that actions such as blocking and attacking on blocks could potentially trigger detection by AntiCheat plugins. **Use at your own risk!**

## Preview
![third person blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GYfaKNF1/images/e1e0b4b35c8380f47b5dc205244073960ca420ae.png)
![first person blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GYfaKNF1/images/c2c70a9cfa2a0b7e1d59bb7341864c5045eb804d.png)

### Mod-Compatibility
Testet with the following performance mods: Sodium, Iris Shaders & Lithium

### Reports & Bugs
Since the mod alters certain aspects of the original Minecraft code, there is a possibility of encountering errors when used alongside other mods.
If you find any bugs please report them [here](https://github.com/spiderfrog3000/OldCombatMod/issues)!
